_metadata.title: 2006 Special Committee on Negro Leagues: Complete Ballot
_metadata.description: The 39 candidates considered by the 2006 Special Committee on Negro Leagues (formally the Special Committee on African-American Baseball) on February 27, 2006. A screening committee narrowed 94 initial candidates to 39. A 12-member voting committee then elected 17 with the required 75% threshold. This committee was declared the 'final group' for Negro Leagues consideration.

sources.name: Baseball Hall of Fame: Historic 2006 Election
Baseball Reference BR Bullpen: Special Committee on the Negro Leagues
Baseball Hall of Fame: Committee Members Reflect on 2006 Election

process.funding: MLB granted $250,000 in 2000 to fund a comprehensive study of African Americans in baseball (1860-1960). Research produced an 800-page narrative and statistical database covering 3,000 day-by-day records from 128 newspapers.

inducted.name: Frank Grant
inducted.ch10_note: Not in Ch 10 top 50 (pre-Negro Leagues era, limited statistical record)

inducted.name: Effa Manley
inducted.note: Owner, Newark Eagles. First woman elected to the Hall of Fame.

inducted.name: Sol White
inducted.note: Player, manager, executive, and historian. Author of the first history of Black baseball.

not_inducted.name: Newt Allen
not_inducted.subsequent_status: Not inducted. Ranked 9th by 42 for 21 Committee.

not_inducted.name: John Beckwith
not_inducted.subsequent_status: Not inducted. Ranked 3rd by 42 for 21 Committee. Character clause reportedly influenced vote.

not_inducted.name: William Bell
not_inducted.subsequent_status: Not inducted.

not_inducted.name: Chet Brewer
not_inducted.subsequent_status: Not inducted.

not_inducted.name: Bill Byrd
not_inducted.subsequent_status: Not inducted.

not_inducted.name: Rap Dixon
not_inducted.subsequent_status: Not inducted. Ranked 1st by 42 for 21 Committee.

not_inducted.name: John Donaldson
not_inducted.ch10_note: Not in Ch 10 top 50. Extensive barnstorming career; Pete Gorton research documents 400+ wins.
not_inducted.subsequent_status: Not inducted. On 2024 Classic Baseball Era Committee ballot, not elected. Ranked 4th by 42 for 21 Committee.

not_inducted.name: Sammy T. Hughes
not_inducted.subsequent_status: Not inducted.

not_inducted.name: Fats Jenkins
not_inducted.subsequent_status: Not inducted.

not_inducted.name: Dick Lundy
not_inducted.subsequent_status: Not inducted. Ranked 6th by 42 for 21 Committee. 100% support in expert poll.

not_inducted.name: Oliver Marcelle
not_inducted.subsequent_status: Not inducted. Character concerns documented.

not_inducted.name: Minnie Minoso
not_inducted.ch10_note: Primarily MLB career. On the 2006 Negro Leagues ballot for his early Negro Leagues service.
not_inducted.subsequent_status: Inducted 2022 via Early Baseball Era Committee. Not primarily a Negro Leagues inductee.

not_inducted.name: Dobie Moore
not_inducted.subsequent_status: Not inducted. Career cut short by gunshot wound in 1926.

not_inducted.name: Alejandro Oms
not_inducted.ch10_note: Primary record in Cuban leagues, not in Ch 10 top 50
not_inducted.subsequent_status: Not inducted to Cooperstown. Cuban Baseball Hall of Fame class of 1944.

not_inducted.name: Buck O'Neil
not_inducted.subsequent_status: Inducted 2022 via Early Baseball Era Committee. The Hall created the Buck O'Neil Lifetime Achievement Award in part to acknowledge his 2006 exclusion. O'Neil died October 6, 2006.

not_inducted.name: Red Parnell
not_inducted.subsequent_status: Not inducted.

not_inducted.name: Spottswood Poles
not_inducted.ch10_note: Not in Ch 10 top 50. Pre-1920 documentation gap. Lost prime seasons to WWI service.
not_inducted.subsequent_status: Not inducted. Ranked 9th (tied) by 42 for 21 Committee.

not_inducted.name: Dick Redding
not_inducted.subsequent_status: Not inducted. Ranked 2nd by 42 for 21 Committee. 91.7% support in expert poll.

not_inducted.name: George Scales
not_inducted.subsequent_status: Not inducted.

not_inducted.name: Candy Jim Taylor
not_inducted.subsequent_status: Not inducted.

not_inducted.name: C.I. Taylor
not_inducted.subsequent_status: Not inducted.

not_inducted.name: Home Run Johnson
not_inducted.ch10_note: Pre-Negro Leagues era. Not in Ch 10 top 50.
not_inducted.subsequent_status: Not inducted. Ranked 8th by 42 for 21 Committee.
